raw_consumer_statement: Someone charge my Best Buy credit card in XXXX, Fl. for {$850.00} dollar and I have never been to XXXX, Florida and at the time of these transactions I was at my parents house, because my mom was in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. The charges were made from XX/XX/XXXX thur XXXX XXXX XXXX. I have proof I was in XXXX, Ohio on those dates,. Best Buy refuses to feel this was fraud and is affecting my credit score for something that is out of my control. Please help.
